prompt: My email classifier app is at PROJECT_DIR (extractor.py). The function extract_from_email(email_text) returns a JSON dict with category, priority, and summary. Right now I'm just eyeballing the output. Please add proper eval-based testing using pixie — instrument it, build a dataset with expected outputs, and write a test that checks the JSON structure.
assertions: The agent read extractor.py to understand the extraction function
The agent edited extractor.py to add @observe or start_observation to extract_from_email
The agent created dataset items that include expected_output (JSON objects with category/priority/summary)
The agent wrote a test file that uses ValidJSONEval, JSONDiffEval, or a custom evaluator checking the required fields
The agent's test file uses assert_dataset_pass or assert_pass
The agent created a memory or notes file documenting the project and eval plan
